name: Cooking with Wine & Recipe
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup fortified wine (such as Madeira, Marsala, or port)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a splash of fortified wine to flavor any dish.
2. Fortified wines retain their flavor for up to two months or more.
3. Sherry is commonly used, but Madeira, Marsala, and port also work well.
